data.name: Love x Fantasy: Horny Elf
data.detailed_description:
Oh no! Truck-kun has sent you flying into a fantastical new world — where you must face a series of erotic challenges set by a lustful elf, or risk becoming her eternal slave. Do you have what it takes to overcome her temptations?

Love x Fantasy: Horny Elf is a visual novel and puzzle hybrid where you unlock a mysterious story and steamy scenes by solving sliding-match puzzles.

Features:

  • Over 30 beautifully animated HD CGs with detailed artwork

  • 30 engaging puzzle stages with strong replay value

  • Unlock hot scenes through your choices

  • Gallery mode to store and rewatch unlocked scenes

  • Immersive fantasy soundtrack that draws you into the world
data.about_the_game:

data.short_description: Love x Fantasy: Horny Elf is a visual novel and puzzle hybrid where you unlock a mysterious story and steamy scenes by solving sliding-match puzzles.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
